title: Parity Title
description: Simply removes the "Java Edition" subtitle. (And the shadow beneath the logo)
body:
![The pack's effect on 1.21.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cac3c8c0149ac4c569ba726ae2c7319d6c8ba08.png)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4349ce8dab7a5ee14ca10cc4528002f9f495acd0.png)
---

Simple pack that removes the "Java Edition" logo from the main menu. As long as the logo resource pack location remains unchanged, the pack will also never need to be updated, and it will always work with the latest version/snapshot.

![Version Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/228f6f5a49886f4281198e7ec359bba25e4541fc.png)
---

### Standard Version
For people playing 1.20 or newer, **without** any other resource packs that **modify minecraft's logo.**

### No Logo Version

This version doesn't have a logo file, so it is compatible with **1.12 - 1.19.4.**

It can also be used in **1.20** or newer, **if you want to leave the main logo alone**, as it may be changed by another resource pack, but you still want to remove the version name.
